ddls:
CREATE TABLE "experiments" (
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each experiment */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the experiment */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the experiment */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used in the experiment (e.g., learning rate, discount factor) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the experiment */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the experiment (e.g., running, completed, failed) */,
  "experiment_version" TEXT /* Version of the experiment */,
  "environment_name" TEXT /* Name of the environment where the experiment is conducted */,
  "agent_name" TEXT /* Name of the RL agent used in the experiment */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model used in the experiment */,
  "total_timesteps" INTEGER /* Total number of timesteps in the experiment */,
  "total_rewards" REAL /* Total rewards accumulated during the experiment */,
  "average_reward" REAL /* Average reward per timestep */,
  "success_rate" REAL /* Success rate of the agent in the experiment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "timesteps" (
  "timestep_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each timestep */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the timestep belongs to */,
  "timestep" INTEGER /* Timestep number within the experiment */,
  "logstd_action_dist" TEXT /* Log standard deviation of the action distribution */,
  "obs" TEXT /* Observation data at the timestep */,
  "avg_action_dist" TEXT /* Average action distribution at the timestep */,
  "human_obs" TEXT /* Human-readable observation data */,
  "rewards" REAL /* Rewards received at the timestep */,
  "original_rewards" REAL /* Original rewards before any transformations */,
  "actions" TEXT /* Actions taken by the agent at the timestep */,
  "environment_state" TEXT /* Current state of the environment at the timestep */,
  "agent_state" TEXT /* Current state of the agent at the timestep */,
  "action_probability" REAL /* Probability of the action taken by the agent */,
  "next_state" TEXT /* Next state of the environment after the action */,
  "terminal" INTEGER /* Boolean indicating if the timestep is the last in the episode */,
  "episode_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the episode within the experiment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("timestep_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_timesteps_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the experiment */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the experiment was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user's device */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  "duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric */,
  "experiment_id" INTEGER /* ID of the experiment the metric belongs to */,
  "metric_name" TEXT /* Name of the performance metric (e.g., average reward, success rate) */,
  "metric_value" REAL /* Value of the performance metric */,
  "metric_date" TEXT /* Date when the metric was recorded */,
  "metric_type" TEXT /* Type of the performance metric (e.g., per-episode, per-timestep) */,
  "metric_description" TEXT /* Description of the metric */,
  "metric_unit" TEXT /* Unit of the metric (e.g., percentage, points) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_experiment_id FOREIGN KEY ("experiment_id") REFERENCES experiments ("experiment_id")
)
